locations.name: Samar Island Natural Park
locations.summary: The Samar Island Natural Park, in Samar, is the largest contiguous tract of old-growth forest in the Philippines.

relations.subject: Blue-crowned racket-tail
relations.evidence: It is found in multiple protected areas such as Bicol Natural Park Pasonanca Natural Park, Rajah Sikatuna Protected Landscape, Northern Negros Natural Park, Samar Island Natural Park but like all areas in the Philippines, protection is lax and deforestation continues despite this protection on paper

relations.subject: Blue-crowned racket-tail
relations.evidence: While not endangered, this species' population is on the decline due to habitat loss and the cagebird trade
relations.object_summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

relations.subject: Blue-crowned racket-tail
relations.evidence: However, this species' population is said to be decreasing.Deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
